---
status: public
shortDescription: "One can control access to local variables using access modifiers"
shortCorrection: "One cannot control access to local variables"
concepts:
  - Variable

  - Lifetime

spec:
  - id: jls13
    sections: ["14.4"]
text:
  - id: ofj6
    sections: ["6"]
---

One can control the level of access to local variables by adding access modifiers
(like `public` or `private`) to local variable declarations.

frontmatter.shortDescription: One can control access to local variables using access modifiers
frontmatter.shortCorrection: One cannot control access to local variables
